---
title: "Apples vs. Oranges"
subtitle: "A comparison deck template"
author: "Your Name"
date: today
date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme:
      - default
      - schemes/select-deepmind.scss
      - apples-oranges.scss
    slide-number: true
    transition: fade
    background-transition: fade
    footer: "Apples & Oranges"
    css: apples-oranges.css
    center-title-slide: false
    title-slide-attributes:
      class: title-split
---

## Why compare? {.apple}

- Two options, one decision
- Each side gets its own visual voice
- Contrast keeps the audience oriented

::: {.callout-note}
Apple slides use **apple text** on a solid **orange** background. Callouts use neutral **bananas** text on desaturated orange-tinted panels.
:::

```python
# regular syntax highlighting
variety = "honeycrisp"
```

::: {.footer-label}
Apple on orange
:::

## Why compare? {.orange}

- Mirror structure, inverted palette
- Same layout, different emphasis
- Easy to scan which side you're on

::: {.callout-tip}
Orange slides use **orange text** on a solid **apple** background. Callouts use neutral **bananas** text on desaturated apple-tinted panels.
:::

```python
# regular syntax highlighting
variety = "cara_cara"
```

::: {.footer-label}
Orange on apple
:::

## {.compare}

::: {.compare-grid}
::: {.compare-apple}
::: {.compare-label}
Apples
:::

### Strengths

- Crisp texture
- Long shelf life
- Great for baking

### Trade-offs

- Less juice per bite
- Fewer varieties in season
:::

::: {.compare-orange}
::: {.compare-label}
Oranges
:::

### Strengths

- High vitamin C
- Segment-friendly
- Bright, fresh flavor

### Trade-offs

- Peel can be messy
- Shorter peak freshness
:::
:::

## Neutral ground {.bananas}

- Use `{.bananas}` for content that does not take a side
- Readable body text on a **bananas** (neutral) background
- Callouts and code use desaturated bananas-tinted panels

::: {.callout-note}
Neutral slides sit outside the apples / oranges pairing — good for summaries, agenda, or shared context.
:::

::: {.footer-label}
Bananas neutral
:::

## Summary {.apple}

- [Apples]{.text-apple}, [oranges]{.text-orange}, and [bananas]{.text-bananas} — apples/oranges pair across sides; bananas is the neutral tone — see `schemes/catalog.yml`
- Use [bananas]{.text-bananas} for neutral emphasis that reads on either side
- Color scheme: set `schemes/select-<name>.scss` in the theme list (`schemes/catalog.yml`)
- Title slide: `title-slide-attributes: { class: title-split }`
- Item slides: `{.apple}` and `{.orange}`
- Neutral slides: `{.bananas}`
- Comparison: `{.compare}` with `.compare-grid`

::: {.footer-label}
Template ready
:::
